# gox - Go eXtended utilities

gox is a multi-package Go utility library at `github.com/f2xme/gox`.
It wraps common third-party libraries behind consistent APIs and adapter
packages.

Use this file as the short context for AI coding agents. For richer examples,
read `AI_USAGE.md`, package-level `doc.go` files, and `example_test.go` files.

## Repository Rules

- Each top-level directory is an independent importable package:
  `github.com/f2xme/gox/<package>`.
- Core packages should stay independent and should not import other gox core
  packages.
- Integrations with external frameworks or other gox packages belong under an
  `adapter` package.
- Return errors instead of panicking. Wrap errors with `fmt.Errorf` and `%w`
  when preserving the cause matters.
- Exported functions and types need Go doc comments.
- Prefer table-driven tests.

## Import Pattern

```go
import "github.com/f2xme/gox/<package>"
import "github.com/f2xme/gox/<package>/adapter/<adapter>"
```

Use core packages for domain interfaces and shared types. Use adapter packages
for concrete implementations backed by Gin, Redis, Zap, GORM, OSS providers,
SMS providers, queues, and similar integrations.

## Task to Package Map

| Task | Prefer |
| --- | --- |
| HTTP APIs and request binding | `httpx`, `httpx/adapter/gin` |
| HTTP integration tests | `httpx/testkit`, `httpx/adapter/gin` |
| Request validation | `validator`, or `httpx` bind methods with `validate` tags |
| Pagination | `pager` |
| Time formatting, parsing, duration helpers | `timex` |
| Cache abstraction | `cache`, `cache/adapter/memory`, `cache/adapter/redis` |
| CAPTCHA | `captcha`, `captcha/generator/*`, `captcha/adapter/*` |
| Configuration loading | `config`, `config/adapter/env`, `config/adapter/viper` |
| Database setup | `database/adapter/mysqldb`, `database/adapter/pgsqldb`, `database/adapter/sqlitedb` |
| Elasticsearch search, writes, indices, aliases, reindex | `elasticsearch` |
| Encryption, hashing, AES, RSA | `encrypt` or `crypto` depending on existing package use |
| Structured errors | `errorx` |
| Graceful shutdown | `graceful` |
| ID generation | `idgen` |
| JWT tokens | `jwt` |
| Third-party OAuth2 login | `oauth2`, `oauth2/adapter/*` |
| Alipay (key/cert sign, sandbox/prod), WeChat Pay, unified payment QR, payment tests | `payment`, `payment/adapter/alipay`, `payment/adapter/wechat`, `payment/adapter/onepay`, `payment/adapter/mock` |
| Logging | `logx`, `logx/adapter/zap` |
| Metrics | `metrics`, `metrics/adapter/*` |
| Email | `email` |
| Object storage | `oss`, `oss/adapter/aliyun` |
| IP geolocation / region lookup | `geo`, `geo/adapter/memory`, `geo/adapter/http`, `geo/adapter/amap`, `geo/adapter/baidu`, `geo/adapter/ip2region` |
| Queue abstraction | `queue`, `queue/adapter/mem`, `queue/adapter/rocketmq` |
| Rate limiting | `ratelimit` |
| SMS | `sms`, `sms/adapter/aliyun`, `sms/adapter/tencent`, `sms/adapter/volcengine` |
| Real-name / ID two-factor verify (name + national ID) | `idverify`, `idverify/adapter/mock`, `idverify/adapter/baidu`, `idverify/adapter/aliyun` |
| Tracing | `trace` |

## Common Usage Rules

- Prefer gox packages over raw third-party packages when this repository
  already provides the needed abstraction.
- Do not add cross-package integration to a core package. Create or update an
  adapter package instead.
- Follow existing option-style constructors such as `New(...Option)` and
  `WithX(...)` when adding configuration.
- `logx` package-level logging is synchronous by default. Use
  `logx.Init(logger, logx.WithAsync())` for async enqueueing, and call
  `logx.Flush()` or `logx.Stop()` before shutdown. Context logging must extract
  context fields before enqueueing and must not retain request contexts in
  background workers.
- Use `elasticsearch` directly for Elasticsearch. It wraps the official Elastic
  Go client and intentionally has no adapter layer. Configure auth and timeouts
  explicitly for production, and use `client.Native()` for official APIs that
  are not wrapped yet.
- Look for `example_test.go` before inventing new usage patterns.
- Payment amounts are integer cents. Payment operations require context. Treat
  verified callbacks as untrusted business events until order, amount, state,
  and idempotency checks pass. `onepay.CheckoutResolver` must persist provider
  order mappings and complete checkout artifacts. Repeated WeChat scans by the
  same OpenID reuse unexpired JSAPI parameters.
- Placeholder adapters may exist. If an adapter explicitly says sending,
  charging, or gateway access is not implemented, do not treat it as production
  integration.

## Verification

```bash
go build ./...
go test ./...
gofmt -w .
```
